code: import{useState,useEffect}from'react';{/*ScrollListener permite la escucha y segumiento del valor de desplazamiento del usuario en la web.*/}const ScrollListener=_ref=>{let{onScroll}=_ref;const[scrollPercentage,setScrollPercentage]=useState(0);useEffect(()=>{const handleScroll=()=>{const scrollTop=window.pageYOffset||document.documentElement.scrollTop;const scrollHeight=document.documentElement.scrollHeight-document.documentElement.clientHeight;const percentage=scrollTop/scrollHeight*100;setScrollPercentage(percentage);onScroll(percentage);};window.addEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);return()=>{window.removeEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);};},[onScroll]);return null;};export default ScrollListener;
